name: 3M™ Removable Label Material FP018209, White Polypropylene, Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Removable White Polypropylene Label Material FP018209 is a white opaque material that offers excellent durability. This label product utilizes 3M™ Adhesive R3500, which is an ultra removable acrylic designed for use on smooth surfaces such as glass, metal, and plastic (including polystyrene). This adhesive offers excellent UV resistance, good initial tack, and long term adhesion with clean removability. An excellent choice for an alternative to static cling. Note: As a removable adhesive, performance may vary depending upon the substrate to which it is applied. Therefore, extensive testing should be conducted prior to use. Textured surfaces should be avoided. Not appropriate for children’s toy sticker applications.
benefits: Allows for clean label removal without adhesive residue remaining on the substrates
Topcoated and non-topcoated materials allowing print flexibility
Can be used for protective and masking applications in addition to identification
